pages.text: $(bold)/nightsmediumcore hearts$(): shows your current base hearts in the form current/max.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore hearts total$(): shows your total hearts including lifesteal bonuses.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore hearts living$(): shows your current lifesteal hearts against the cap.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore give hearts <player> <amount>$(): transfers that many of your own hearts to another player. Lifesteal hearts drain first.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore convert crystal <amount>$(): spends your hearts to receive Crystal Heart items. Lifesteal hearts spend first.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore convert living <amount>$(): spends your hearts to receive Living Heart items.
